prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算 机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与郑州大学工科优势方向匹配；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定偏热；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72 万人，较2025年增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；郑州大学位于河南 省，与山东省接壤，属邻省高校，地域偏好中性偏正面；该校在山东省招生规模较大（2025年268人），对山东考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势已明 显放缓、2026年小幅扩招（+14人）及学校排名持续提升（软科第44名）等正面因素，与山东省考生总数大幅增加（+5.7%）、声誉偏负面等负面因素相互权衡，预计2026年最低位 次在2025年48195名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约49906名，区间49406–50406名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were 27823 → 32458 → 40627 → 47164 → 48195, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years (ranking numbers increasing), with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 20372 places from 2021 to 2025; the increase has narrowed significantly in the last 2 years (2024: +6537, 2025: only +1031), indicating rankings are stabilizing; the 2025 baseline is approximately 48195; the university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Shandong Province was 254 in 2021, 257 in 2022, 258 in 2023, 243 in 2024, and 268 in 2025; the 2026 comprehensive plan is 231 and medical plan is 51, totaling 282, an increase of 14 (+5.22%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University main ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management response-related public opinion; the 2025 reputation was also negative, with admission scores showing signs of decline nationwide; Douyin heat ranking is 8th overall (high heat), with comprehensive heat of approximately 5.85 million, indicating high exposure on short video platforms and considerable attention from applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with Zhengzhou University's engineering strengths; medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain stable and popular; the total number of applicants for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Zhengzhou University is located in Henan Province, adjacent to Shandong Province, making it a neighboring province university with a neutral to slightly positive regional preference; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (268 in 2025), which attracts Shandong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Balancing positive factors such as the clearly slowed backward trend of historical rankings, a slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+14 students), and the university's continuously rising ranking (Soft Science 44th), against negative factors like a significant increase in the total number of Shandong applicants (+5.7%) and a somewhat negative reputation, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 48195; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 49906, with a range of 49406 to 50406.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 49406–50406, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<49406), you can prioritize Tier 1 majors like Law and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>50406), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhengzhou University's medical category in Shandong Province were 23,008, 24,891, 29,216, 38,795, and 52,899 respectively, showing a continuous decline over five consecutive years (ranking numbers increasing year by year), with an average annual drop of approximately 7,473 places, and the largest drop of 14,104 places in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 49 students in 2021, 49 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 51 in 2025, with minor fluctuations between 49 and 51. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 51 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and a supply-demand elasticity coefficient of zero.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, and is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. As the only 211 university in Henan Province, its medical disciplines have strong influence in the central region, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors maintaining high application popularity for a long time.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors in Shandong Province continue to maintain high application popularity, especially core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology, which are highly competitive. The enrollment scale of Zhengzhou University's medical category in Shandong Province is stable at around 50 students, which is a medium-to-small scale, and the supply-demand relationship has been tight for a long time. In recent years, the overall application popularity for medical majors in Shandong Province has increased, pushing up the admission rankings of various medical colleges.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Taking all factors into consideration, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Zhengzhou University's medical category in 2026 is 53,699, continuing a slight decline from 2025 (ranking number increasing), with a fluctuation range of 53,269 to 54,129. Although the enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, the trend of rising application popularity for medical majors has not changed, and the ranking is expected to continue to move downward.
